Um, as a brief reminder of how these
resumable upload things work, um, the
client can basically indicate its
interests when starting a data transfer
using just a simple header. And if the
server wants to allow resumable uploads,
which it might not always do, um, it
then creates an upload resource and
communicates its URI back to the client,
which can then use it to resume the
upload if it got interrupted. If it
never got interrupted, the data transfer
just completes as normal and the upload
resources never used. But if there's
interruptions, then uploads can be
